+import { ContentFormatSwitch } from '~/components/modules/shared/ContentFormatSwitch'
+
+import { PageLexicalRenderer, PageMarkdownRenderer } from './pageExtra'
+
+export function PageContent({
+  contentFormat,
+  content,
+}: {
+  contentFormat?: string
+  content?: string | null
+}) {
+  return (
+    <ContentFormatSwitch
+      contentFormat={contentFormat}
+      content={content}
+      markdown={<PageMarkdownRenderer />}
+      lexical={<PageLexicalRenderer />}
+    />
+  )
+}
diff --git a/apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(page-detail)/[slug]/api.ts b/apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(page-detail)/[slug]/api.ts

+import { cache } from 'react'
+
+import { attachServerFetch } from '~/lib/attach-fetch'
+import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
+import { requestErrorHandler } from '~/lib/request.server'
+
+export interface PageParams extends LocaleParams {
+  slug: string
+}
+
+export const getData = cache(async (slug: string) => {
+  await attachServerFetch()
+  const data = await apiClient.page
+    .getBySlug(slug, { prefer: 'lexical' })
+    .catch(requestErrorHandler)
+  return data.$serialized
+})

+import { cache } from 'react'
+
+import { attachServerFetch } from '~/lib/attach-fetch'
+import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
+import { requestErrorHandler } from '~/lib/request.server'
+
+export interface PageParams extends LocaleParams {
+  slug: string
+}
+
+export const getData = cache(async (slug: string) => {
+  await attachServerFetch()
+  const data = await apiClient.page
+    .getBySlug(slug, { prefer: 'lexical' })
+    .catch(requestErrorHandler)
+  return data.$serialized
+})

    22	export const postCreateHandler: EventHandler = (data) => {
    23	  const { title, category, slug } = data as PostModel
    24	  toast.success(`有新的内容发布了：「${title}」`, {
    25	    onClick: () => {
    26	      window.peek(`/posts/${category.slug}/${slug}`)

    33	
    34	export const postUpdateHandler: EventHandler = (data) => {
    35	  const post = data as PostModel
    36	  const currentData = getGlobalCurrentPostData()
    37	
    38	  if (!currentData) return
    39	  if (currentData.id !== post.id) return
    40	
    41	  const contentChanged =
    42	    currentData.text !== post.text || currentData.content !== post.content
    43	
    44	  const currentTranslation = getTranslation()
    45	  if (
    46	    currentTranslation &&
    47	    currentTranslation.refId === post.id &&
    48	    !getViewingOriginal() &&
    49	    contentChanged

    51	    setTranslationPending(true)

    53

    55	    const nextPost = { ...data }
    56	    Reflect.deleteProperty(nextPost, 'category')
    57	    Object.assign(draft, nextPost)
    58	  })
    59	  toast.info(updateMessage)
    60	  trackerRealtimeEvent()
    61	
    62	  if (contentChanged) {
    63	    setTimeout(() => {
    64	      document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent(DOMCustomEvents.RefreshToc))
    65	    }, 100)

    67	}

    74	        category: post.category.slug,
    75	        slug: post.slug,

    81	    trackerRealtimeEvent()
    82	  }
    83	}
    84	
    85	export const postHandlers = {

    89	} as const

     8	} from '~/atoms/translation'
     9	import { FaSolidFeatherAlt } from '~/components/icons/menu-collection'
    10	import { DOMCustomEvents } from '~/constants/event'
    11	import { routeBuilder, Routes } from '~/lib/route-builder'
    12	import { toast } from '~/lib/toast'
    13	import {
    14	  getCurrentNoteData,
    15	  setCurrentNoteData,
    16	} from '~/providers/note/CurrentNoteDataProvider'
    17	import { EventTypes } from '~/types/events'
    18	
    19	import type { EventHandler } from './types'
    20	import { trackerRealtimeEvent, updateMessage } from './types'
    21	
    22	export const noteCreateHandler: EventHandler = (data) => {
    23	  const { title, nid } = data as NoteModel
    24	
    25	  toast.success(`有新的内容发布了：「${title}」`, {
    26	    onClick: () => {
    27	      window.peek(`/notes/${nid}`)
    28	    },
    29	    iconElement: React.createElement(FaSolidFeatherAlt),
    30	    autoClose: false,
    31	  })
    32	
    33	  trackerRealtimeEvent()
    34	}
    35	
    36	export const noteUpdateHandler: EventHandler = (data) => {
    37	  const note = data as NoteModel
    38	  const currentData = getCurrentNoteData()?.data
    39	
    40	  if (!currentData) return
    41	  if (currentData.id !== note.id) return
    42	
    43	  const contentChanged =
    44	    currentData.text !== note.text || currentData.content !== note.content
    45	
    46	  const currentTranslation = getTranslation()
    47	  if (
    48	    currentTranslation &&
    49	    currentTranslation.refId === note.id &&
    50	    !getViewingOriginal() &&
    51	    contentChanged
    52	  ) {
    53	    setTranslationPending(true)
    54	  }
    55	
    56	  setCurrentNoteData((draft) => {
    57	    Object.assign(draft.data, note)
    58	  })
    59	  toast.info(updateMessage)
    60	  trackerRealtimeEvent()
    61	
    62	  if (contentChanged) {
    63	    setTimeout(() => {
    64	      document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent(DOMCustomEvents.RefreshToc))
    65	    }, 100)
    66	  }
    67	}
    68	
    69	export const noteDeleteHandler: EventHandler = (data, { router }) => {
    70	  const note = data as NoteModel
    71	  if (
    72	    location.pathname ===
    73	      routeBuilder(Routes.Note, {
    74	        id: note.id,
    75	      }) &&
    76	    getCurrentNoteData()?.data.id === note.id
    77	  ) {
    78	    router.replace(routeBuilder(Routes.PageDeletd, {}))
    79	    toast.error('手记已删除')
    80	    trackerRealtimeEvent()
    81	  }
    82	}
    83	
    84	export const noteHandlers = {
    85	  [EventTypes.NOTE_CREATE]: noteCreateHandler,
    86	  [EventTypes.NOTE_UPDATE]: noteUpdateHandler,
    87	  [EventTypes.NOTE_DELETE]: noteDeleteHandler,
    88	} as const

     8	import type { LinkCardData, LinkCardPlugin, UrlMatchResult } from '../../types'
     9	
    10	export const mxSpacePlugin: LinkCardPlugin = {
    11	  name: 'self',
    12	  displayName: 'MxSpace Article',
    13	  priority: 10, // Low priority - catch internal links last
    14	
    15	  matchUrl(url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null {
    16	    // Check if it's a self URL
    17	    const webUrl = getWebUrl()
    18	    const webHost = webUrl ? new URL(webUrl).hostname : ''
    19	
    20	    const isSelfHost = webHost === url.hostname
    21	
    22	    if (!isSelfHost) return null
    23	
    24	    // Check for posts or notes paths
    25	    if (
    26	      !url.pathname.startsWith('/posts/') &&
    27	      !url.pathname.startsWith('/notes/')
    28	    ) {
    29	      return null
    30	    }
    31	
    32	    return {
    33	      id: url.pathname.slice(1), // Remove leading slash
    34	      fullUrl: url.toString(),
    35	    }
    36	  },
    37	
    38	  isValidId(id: string): boolean {
    39	    const [type, ...rest] = id.split('/')
    40	    if (type !== 'posts' && type !== 'notes') {
    41	      return false
    42	    }
    43	    if (type === 'posts') {
    44	      return rest.length === 2
    45	    }
    46	    return rest.length === 1
    47	  },
    48	
    49	  async fetch(id: string): Promise<LinkCardData> {
    50	    const [type, ...rest] = id.split('/')
    51	
    52	    let data: {
    53	      title: string
    54	      text?: string
    55	      images?: { src: string }[]
    56	      meta?: Record<string, any> | null
    57	      cover?: string
    58	      summary?: string | null
    59	    } = { title: '', text: '' }
    60	
    61	    if (type === 'posts') {
    62	      const [cate, slug] = rest
    63	      data = await apiClient.post.getPost(cate, slug)
    64	    } else if (type === 'notes') {
    65	      const [nid] = rest
    66	      const response = await apiClient.note.getNoteById(+nid)
    67	      data = response.data
    68	    }
    69	
    70	    const coverImage = data.cover || data.meta?.cover
    71	    let spotlightColor = ''
    72	
    73	    if (coverImage) {
    74	      // Async load dominant color
    75	      const $image = new Image()
    76	      $image.src = coverImage
    77	      $image.crossOrigin = 'Anonymous'
    78	      // Note: In the plugin architecture, we can't update state after initial return
    79	      // The color will be set initially, and dynamic update would require different handling
    80	      try {
    81	        await new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {
    82	          $image.onload = () => {
    83	            spotlightColor = getDominantColor($image)
    84	            resolve()
    85	          }
    86	          $image.onerror = reject
    87	          // Timeout fallback
    88	          setTimeout(resolve, 3000)
    89	        })
    90	      } catch {
    91	        // Use fallback color
    92	        spotlightColor = uniqolor(data.title, {
    93	          saturation: [30, 35],
    94	          lightness: [60, 70],
    95	        }).color
    96	      }
    97	    } else {
    98	      spotlightColor = uniqolor(data.title, {
    99	        saturation: [30, 35],
   100	        lightness: [60, 70],
   101	      }).color
   102	    }
   103	
   104	    return {
   105	      title: data.title,
   106	      desc: data.summary || `${RemoveMarkdown(data.text ?? '').slice(0, 50)}...`,
   107	      image: coverImage || data.images?.[0]?.src,
   108	      color: spotlightColor,
   109	    }
   110	  },
   111	}

    95	        {data.topic && (

    97	            mobileAsSheet
    98	            triggerElement={
    99	              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   100	                <img
   101	                  src={data.topic?.icon}
   102	                  alt=""
   103	                  className="size-5 rounded-full"
   104	                />
   105	                <div>{data.topic && data.topic.name}</div>
   106	              </div>
   107	            }
   108	          >
   109	            <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
   110	              <div>专栏：{data.topic.name}</div>
   111	            </div>
   112	          </FloatPopover>
   113	        )}
   114	      </div>
   115	    )
   116	  },
   117	
   118	  right(data) {
   119	    if (!data) return null
   120	    return (
   121	      <>
   122	        <Link
   123	          className="absolute inset-0 bottom-8 z-[1]"
   124	          to={`/dashboard/notes/edit?id=${data.id}`}
   125	        />
   126	      </>
   127	    )
   128	  },
   129	}

   131	export const config = defineRouteConfig({
   132	  title: '列表',

   134	  priority: 1,
   135	})

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-23 16:44:57Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Identifying preview compile break and content format reactivity issues**
</details></think>

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-23 16:45:01Z)**_

**Findings**
1. High: `PageMarkdown` export was removed but is still imported, causing a hard compile failure.
`apps/web/src/app/[locale]/preview/page.tsx:44`
`apps/web/src/app/[locale]/preview/page.tsx:311`
`apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(page-detail)/[slug]/pageExtra.tsx:43`
I verified with `pnpm -C apps/web exec tsc --noEmit --incremental false`, which reports:
`TS2305: Module "../(page-detail)/[slug]/pageExtra" has no exported member 'PageMarkdown'.`

2. Medium: The new RSC format switch is decided once from server props, so it won’t react if client data later changes format (e.g. realtime update/revalidation), which can render blank/wrong content.
`apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/ContentFormatSwitch.tsx:14`
`apps/web/src/app/[locale]/posts/(post-detail)/[category]/[slug]/page.tsx:169`
`apps/web/src/app/[locale]/notes/[id]/page.tsx:134`
`apps/web/src/socket/handlers/post.ts:54`
`apps/web/src/socket/handlers/note.ts:56`

3. Low: Page-specific behavior is no longer symmetric with posts/notes. Equipment-style selection is now only in the page route, while preview still renders through page-extra content path.
`apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(page-detail)/[slug]/page.tsx:31`
`apps/web/src/app/[locale]/preview/page.tsx:311`
This is currently masked by finding #1, but it’s a consistency/runtime risk once #1 is fixed.

**Open Question**
1. Can post/note updates change `contentFormat` (`markdown` <-> `lexical`) in production events? If yes, finding #2 is a real behavioral regression, not just a theoretical edge case.

**Quick summary**
The lexical refactor is mostly wired correctly (`prefer: 'lexical'` and null-safe `text` handling were applied across post/note/page flows), but there is one definite broken import/export and one likely runtime regression around live format switching.
